title: Systematic Steps for Analyzing Non-Recursive Algorithms
description: A flowchart illustrating the step-by-step methodology for mathematically determining the time complexity (Big O) of a non-recursive algorithm.
elements: Express Count as a Function f(n)
Establish Big O Asymptotic Upper Bound
relationships: Sequential flow from one step to the next, with a feedback loop from 'Count Frequency' to 'Determine Input Size' to handle nested loops
